### Changes

#### Description: A compact, clean UI with relevant Fessior-themed Figma design of a URL Shortener web application.
---
#### Changes:
- In "src" folder, added "app", "components" and "static" sub-folders that comprise of the main interface of the URL-Shortener, important components (e.g. inputContainer, shortenButton, copyToClipboard,  resultCard...) and static images (e.g. icons, MockQR...), respectively.
- Inside the "app" sub-folder, there is a "mainPage" folder reserved for the UI layout of the URL-Shortener endpoint. ("/")
- Inside the "components" sub-folder, there is a "ui" folder used to separate smaller components from large ones such as the Result Modal.
- Deleted the App.css due to delegation to TailwindCSS.
- Changed main.tsx to "layout.tsx" to match personal frontend architecture preferences.
